flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Minnesota North College fell 17% between 2006 and 2009 (36.4% → 30.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Minnesota North College rose 210% between 2021 and 2024 (649 → 2.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Minnesota North College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Minnesota North College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.1k → $6.0k).
